```{=html}
<style>
.reveal .formula-cat-animation {
  width: min(100%, 1040px);
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.reveal .formula-cat-stage {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
}

.reveal .formula-cat-scene {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  max-height: 560px;
}

.reveal .formula-cat-animation text {
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

.reveal .formula-cat-floor {
  stroke: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.34);
  stroke-width: 3;
  stroke-linecap: round;
}

.reveal .formula-cat-rain {
  position: absolute;
  z-index: 2;
  inset: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.reveal .formula-cat-formula {
  position: absolute;
  top: -16%;
  left: var(--formula-left);
  color: #f6fbff;
  font-size: var(--formula-size, 0.56em);
  line-height: 1;
  opacity: 0;
  white-space: nowrap;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 0 rgba(2, 7, 14, 0.96)) drop-shadow(0 0 9px rgba(142, 197, 255, 0.45));
}

.reveal .formula-cat-formula mjx-container {
  margin: 0 !important;
}

.reveal section.present .formula-cat-animation.visible .formula-cat-formula {
  animation: formula-cat-fall 7.2s linear infinite;
  animation-delay: var(--formula-delay);
  transform-origin: center;
}

.reveal .formula-cat-shadow {
  fill: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.32);
}

.reveal .formula-cat-tail,
.reveal .formula-cat-fur {
  fill: url("#formula-cat-fur");
  stroke: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);
  stroke-width: 4;
}

.reveal .formula-cat-belly {
  fill: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72);
}

.reveal .formula-cat-ear-inner,
.reveal .formula-cat-nose {
  fill: #ff9ec8;
}

.reveal .formula-cat-eye {
  fill: #06111e;
}

.reveal .formula-cat-eye-shine {
  fill: #ffffff;
}

.reveal .formula-cat-whiskers,
.reveal .formula-cat-mouth-line {
  fill: none;
  stroke: #06111e;
  stroke-linecap: round;
  stroke-width: 4;
}

.reveal .formula-cat-open-mouth {
  fill: #06111e;
  opacity: 0;
}

.reveal .formula-cat-open-mouth-tongue {
  fill: #ff78a8;
  opacity: 0;
}

.reveal section.present .formula-cat-animation.visible .formula-cat-body {
  animation: formula-cat-squash 7.2s ease-in-out infinite;
  transform-box: view-box;
  transform-origin: 310px 338px;
}

.reveal section.present .formula-cat-animation.visible .formula-cat-left-paw {
  animation: formula-cat-left-paw 7.2s ease-in-out infinite;
  transform-box: view-box;
  transform-origin: 265px 350px;
}

.reveal section.present .formula-cat-animation.visible .formula-cat-right-paw {
  animation: formula-cat-right-paw 7.2s ease-in-out infinite;
  transform-box: view-box;
  transform-origin: 355px 350px;
}

.reveal section.present .formula-cat-animation.visible .formula-cat-mouth-line {
  animation: formula-cat-hide-mouth 7.2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.reveal section.present .formula-cat-animation.visible .formula-cat-open-mouth,
.reveal section.present .formula-cat-animation.visible .formula-cat-open-mouth-tongue {
  animation: formula-cat-roar-mouth 7.2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.reveal section.present .formula-cat-animation.visible .formula-cat-stress {
  animation: formula-cat-stress 7.2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.reveal .formula-cat-roar {
  fill: #ffd166;
  font-family: var(--r-main-font, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif);
  font-size: 40px;
  font-weight: 900;
  opacity: 0;
  paint-order: stroke;
  stroke: rgba(2, 7, 14, 0.92);
  stroke-width: 7px;
}

.reveal section.present .formula-cat-animation.visible .formula-cat-roar {
  animation: formula-cat-roar-text 7.2s ease-in-out infinite;
  transform-box: view-box;
  transform-origin: 430px 140px;
}

@keyframes formula-cat-fall {
  0% {
    top: -16%;
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateX(0) rotate(-12deg);
  }
  8% {
    opacity: 1;
  }
  62% {
    top: 63%;
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateX(var(--formula-drift)) rotate(var(--formula-rotation));
  }
  69% {
    top: 71%;
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateX(calc(var(--formula-drift) + 10px)) rotate(var(--formula-rotation));
  }
  100% {
    top: 71%;
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateX(calc(var(--formula-drift) + 10px)) rotate(var(--formula-rotation));
  }
}

@keyframes formula-cat-squash {
  0%,
  55%,
  100% {
    transform: translateY(0) scale(1, 1);
  }
  62%,
  72% {
    transform: translateY(9px) scale(1.05, 0.94);
  }
  82%,
  92% {
    transform: translateY(-4px) scale(0.98, 1.04);
  }
}

@keyframes formula-cat-left-paw {
  0%,
  68%,
  100% {
    transform: rotate(0deg) translate(0, 0);
  }
  82%,
  92% {
    transform: rotate(-28deg) translate(-20px, -2px);
  }
}

@keyframes formula-cat-right-paw {
  0%,
  68%,
  100% {
    transform: rotate(0deg) translate(0, 0);
  }
  82%,
  92% {
    transform: rotate(28deg) translate(20px, -2px);
  }
}

@keyframes formula-cat-hide-mouth {
  0%,
  74%,
  100% {
    opacity: 1;
  }
  80%,
  94% {
    opacity: 0;
  }
}

@keyframes formula-cat-roar-mouth {
  0%,
  74%,
  100% {
    opacity: 0;
  }
  80%,
  94% {
    opacity: 1;
  }
}

@keyframes formula-cat-stress {
  0%,
  50%,
  100% {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(0);
  }
  58%,
  92% {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(-5px);
  }
}

@keyframes formula-cat-roar-text {
  0%,
  76%,
  100% {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.72) rotate(-5deg);
  }
  83%,
  94% {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1) rotate(-5deg);
  }
}

@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  .reveal section.present .formula-cat-animation.visible * {
    animation-duration: 0.001s !important;
    animation-iteration-count: 1 !important;
  }
}
</style>

<div class="formula-cat-animation fragment" role="img" aria-label="A cartoon cat gets tired of falling particle-physics formulas and finally shouts.">
  <div class="formula-cat-stage">
    <div class="formula-cat-rain" aria-hidden="true">
      <div class="formula-cat-formula" style="--formula-left: 7%; --formula-delay: -0.2s; --formula-drift: -20px; --formula-rotation: -22deg; --formula-size: 0.52em;">
        ¥(¥displaystyle ¥left(i¥gamma^¥mu¥partial_¥mu-m¥right)¥psi=0¥)
      </div>
      <div class="formula-cat-formula" style="--formula-left: 35%; --formula-delay: -0.75s; --formula-drift: 24px; --formula-rotation: 18deg; --formula-size: 0.56em;">
        ¥(¥displaystyle ¥left(¥Box+m^2¥right)¥phi=0¥)
      </div>
      <div class="formula-cat-formula" style="--formula-left: 49%; --formula-delay: -1.3s; --formula-drift: -30px; --formula-rotation: 16deg; --formula-size: 0.46em;">
        ¥(¥displaystyle ¥partial_¥mu F^{¥mu¥nu}+m^2A^¥nu=0¥)
      </div>
      <div class="formula-cat-formula" style="--formula-left: 8%; --formula-delay: -1.85s; --formula-drift: 18px; --formula-rotation: -14deg; --formula-size: 0.46em;">
        ¥(¥displaystyle ¥left(¥Box+m^2¥right)G(x)=¥delta^{(4)}(x)¥)
      </div>
      <div class="formula-cat-formula" style="--formula-left: 45%; --formula-delay: -2.4s; --formula-drift: -24px; --formula-rotation: 12deg; --formula-size: 0.48em;">
        ¥(¥displaystyle ¥mathcal{L}_{¥mathrm{int}}=-e¥,¥bar{¥psi}¥gamma^¥mu¥psi A_¥mu¥)
      </div>
      <div class="formula-cat-formula" style="--formula-left: 12%; --formula-delay: -2.95s; --formula-drift: 14px; --formula-rotation: -18deg; --formula-size: 0.38em;">
        ¥(¥displaystyle ¥mathcal{L}_{¥mathrm{SM}}=¥sum_¥psi¥bar{¥psi}i¥gamma^¥mu D_¥mu¥psi+|D_¥mu¥phi|^2-V(¥phi)+¥cdots¥)
      </div>
      <div class="formula-cat-formula" style="--formula-left: 24%; --formula-delay: -3.5s; --formula-drift: -20px; --formula-rotation: 20deg; --formula-size: 0.36em;">
        ¥(¥displaystyle ¥mathcal{L}_{¥mathrm{QCD}}=-¥frac14G^a_{¥mu¥nu}G^{a¥mu¥nu}+¥bar{q}¥,i¥gamma^¥mu D_¥mu q¥)
      </div>
      <div class="formula-cat-formula" style="--formula-left: 6%; --formula-delay: -4.05s; --formula-drift: 26px; --formula-rotation: -16deg; --formula-size: 0.42em;">
        ¥(¥displaystyle W[C]=¥operatorname{P}¥exp¥!¥left(ig¥oint_C A_¥mu dx^¥mu¥right)¥)
      </div>
      <div class="formula-cat-formula" style="--formula-left: 34%; --formula-delay: -4.6s; --formula-drift: -28px; --formula-rotation: 14deg; --formula-size: 0.4em;">
        ¥(¥displaystyle ¥partial_¥mu J_5^¥mu=¥frac{g^2}{16¥pi^2}F_{¥mu¥nu}¥widetilde{F}^{¥mu¥nu}¥)
      </div>
      <div class="formula-cat-formula" style="--formula-left: 27%; --formula-delay: -5.15s; --formula-drift: 20px; --formula-rotation: -20deg; --formula-size: 0.52em;">
        ¥(¥displaystyle ¥tau_{¥pi^0}=8.4¥times10^{-17}¥,¥mathrm{s}¥)
      </div>
      <div class="formula-cat-formula" style="--formula-left: 48%; --formula-delay: -5.7s; --formula-drift: -18px; --formula-rotation: 18deg; --formula-size: 0.42em;">
        ¥(¥displaystyle V(¥phi)=¥lambda¥left(|¥phi|^2-¥frac{v^2}{2}¥right)^2¥)
      </div>
      <div class="formula-cat-formula" style="--formula-left: 7%; --formula-delay: -6.25s; --formula-drift: 28px; --formula-rotation: -12deg; --formula-size: 0.36em;">
        ¥(¥displaystyle P(¥nu_¥mu¥to¥nu_e)=¥sin^2 2¥theta¥,¥sin^2¥!¥frac{¥Delta m^2L}{4E}¥)
      </div>
      <div class="formula-cat-formula" style="--formula-left: 41%; --formula-delay: -6.8s; --formula-drift: -22px; --formula-rotation: 22deg; --formula-size: 0.48em;">
        ¥(¥displaystyle D_¥mu=¥partial_¥mu+igA_¥mu^aT^a¥)
      </div>
    </div>

  <svg class="formula-cat-scene" viewBox="0 0 620 430">
    <defs>
      <linearGradient id="formula-cat-fur" x1="0" x2="1" y1="0" y2="1">
        <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffffff"/>
        <stop offset="48%" stop-color="#b9ecff"/>
        <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#5f9dff"/>
      </linearGradient>
      <filter id="formula-cat-soft-glow" x="-35%" y="-35%" width="170%" height="170%">
        <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3" result="blur"/>
        <feMerge>
          <feMergeNode in="blur"/>
          <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
        </feMerge>
      </filter>
    </defs>

    <line class="formula-cat-floor" x1="96" y1="386" x2="524" y2="386"/>

    <g class="formula-cat-stress" filter="url(#formula-cat-soft-glow)">
      <path d="M246 118 228 82M280 108 276 70M374 108 384 70M408 118 430 82" fill="none" stroke="#ffd166" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <path d="M302 88 314 58 326 88" fill="none" stroke="#ff7a7a" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    </g>

    <g class="formula-cat-body" filter="url(#formula-cat-soft-glow)">
      <ellipse class="formula-cat-shadow" cx="310" cy="386" rx="116" ry="18"/>
      <path class="formula-cat-tail" d="M392 327 C 466 288 514 326 480 354 C 454 376 420 360 442 338"/>
      <ellipse class="formula-cat-fur" cx="310" cy="329" rx="86" ry="67"/>
      <ellipse class="formula-cat-belly" cx="310" cy="342" rx="48" ry="38"/>
      <path class="formula-cat-fur" d="M228 238 242 184 282 224 C 300 216 324 216 342 224 L 382 184 396 238 C 412 254 421 276 421 301 C 421 348 374 374 310 374 C 246 374 199 348 199 301 C 199 276 211 253 228 238 Z"/>
      <path class="formula-cat-ear-inner" d="M239 229 247 200 268 224 Z"/>
      <path class="formula-cat-ear-inner" d="M381 229 373 200 352 224 Z"/>
      <ellipse class="formula-cat-eye" cx="278" cy="286" rx="9" ry="13"/>
      <ellipse class="formula-cat-eye" cx="342" cy="286" rx="9" ry="13"/>
      <circle class="formula-cat-eye-shine" cx="281" cy="281" r="3"/>
      <circle class="formula-cat-eye-shine" cx="345" cy="281" r="3"/>
      <path class="formula-cat-nose" d="M310 299 300 310 320 310 Z"/>
      <path class="formula-cat-mouth-line" d="M310 312 C 304 323 292 324 284 316 M310 312 C 316 323 328 324 336 316"/>
      <ellipse class="formula-cat-open-mouth" cx="310" cy="324" rx="19" ry="25"/>
      <path class="formula-cat-open-mouth-tongue" d="M296 337 C 304 348 316 348 324 337 C 318 333 302 333 296 337 Z"/>
      <path class="formula-cat-whiskers" d="M258 305 H220 M259 316 H224 M362 305 H400 M361 316 H396"/>
    </g>

    <g class="formula-cat-left-paw" filter="url(#formula-cat-soft-glow)">
      <ellipse class="formula-cat-fur" cx="244" cy="354" rx="27" ry="18"/>
      <path d="M232 350 220 342M242 348 237 337M254 349 262 338" fill="none" stroke="#06111e" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
    </g>

    <g class="formula-cat-right-paw" filter="url(#formula-cat-soft-glow)">
      <ellipse class="formula-cat-fur" cx="376" cy="354" rx="27" ry="18"/>
      <path d="M388 350 400 342M378 348 383 337M366 349 358 338" fill="none" stroke="#06111e" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/>
    </g>

    <text class="formula-cat-roar" x="398" y="148">MEEEOOW!</text>
  </svg>
  </div>
</div>
```
